title: Word-Boundary ATS Filtering
summary: Substring ATS title matching causes false positives (care matches Healthcare, data matches Datadog); word-boundary filtering eliminates them.
body: The ATS title filter was matching substrings instead of word boundaries, causing 'care' to match 'Healthcare' and 'data' to match 'Datadog' in job searches. Switching from substring to word-boundary matching via an existing `containsWord` helper eliminated false positives. The bug surfaced in live debugging with real search queries, confirming the fix works: a 'charge nurse' search then produced 10 strong matches instead of noise. Implemented as PR #218.
